use_cases: Main navigation for web applications with macOS-style floating dock interface
Bottom navigation bar with smooth hover scaling animations based on proximity
Glassmorphism-styled floating navigation using backdrop blur and transparency
App navigation with active state tracking and visual feedback on selection
Responsive navigation component for desktop and mobile platforms
ai_summary: A floating bottom dock navigation component inspired by macOS with glassmorphism styling. Features smooth hover scaling effects that expand icons based on proximity to the hovered item, backdrop blur, semi-transparent backgrounds, and active state tracking. Supports multiple navigation items with icons, labels, and click handlers. Designed for general web application navigation across desktop and mobile platforms.
